EmailTemplate.name: 1218 - Submit your Documents
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome, Please Submit your Documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Please click on the link below to access the documents we require you to complete.
https://allianceaustralia--uat.sandbox.my.salesforce-sites.com/onboarding/apex/b3o__MyDocuments?id={!Contact.Id}
The Alliance Team
